{{Infobox character
| name = Senator Krakal
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Senator Krakal]] is one of the influential leaders present at the meeting.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Senator Krakal]] is a Senator of the planet [[Visiria]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Senator Krakal]] is a senator being challenged by [[Varic]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30">''The Knight'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“You might have to hold me back. I’ve been dying to ask for some investment tips. Senator Krakal, what do you think?”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“I challenge Senator Krakal,” Varic repeated.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c30" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
